unit.name: Knoll
unit.gameplay_identity: Support calibration unit carrying Trader, Harmony through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: one palm-length pear-handled stamp contacting one large pale flexible receipt strip
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: one palm-length pear-handled stamp contacting one large pale flexible receipt strip
unit.supernatural_cost: marks add paired eyelid scars and shorten depth perception

psychology.core_wound: The first person he loved used affection to create an unpayable obligation and then collected it publicly.
psychology.private_want: He wants one relationship that cannot be converted into leverage, though he no longer believes such a thing exists.
psychology.primary_fear: Unpriced care will place him in someone else's debt and leave him unable to control the terms.
psychology.survival_strategy: He makes every relationship transactional before affection can become leverage.
psychology.villainous_distortion: He brands people into reciprocal obligations and destroys anyone who refuses the exchange.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Courteous welcome while deciding the exact pain of collection.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: A service smile versus clinical predatory measurement.
psychology.face_direction: A controlled smile addresses the viewer while one narrowed eye measures the branding site; paired eyelid scars compress depth focus and the jaw stays ready.
psychology.pose_direction: Compact athletic weight bears down behind one enlarged palm-length pear-handled stamp in visible contact with a long pale flexible receipt; one hand grips the isolated handle while the other supports the receipt outside the stamp silhouette.
psychology.forbidden_read: No elderly merchant, grandfather, cane user, harmless shopkeeper, child goblin, comic miser, accountant NPC, or generic assassin.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Courteous welcome while deciding the exact pain of collection.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: He wants one relationship that cannot be converted into leverage, though he no longer believes such a thing exists.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: Unpriced care will place him in someone else's debt and leave him unable to control the terms.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: He makes every relationship transactional before affection can become leverage.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: He brands people into reciprocal obligations and destroys anyone who refuses the exchange.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: A controlled smile addresses the viewer while one narrowed eye measures the branding site; paired eyelid scars compress depth focus and the jaw stays ready. Pose cue: Compact athletic weight bears down behind one enlarged palm-length pear-handled stamp in visible contact with a long pale flexible receipt; one hand grips the isolated handle while the other supports the receipt outside the stamp silhouette.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares knoll directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: He reads as an athletic adult goblin combat bureaucrat, not an elderly merchant or NPC.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: Dry wood, metal rings, receipt paper, skin, and layered cloth are materially separated.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: The stamp-on-receipt action leads; measuring face and service posture support transaction.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: Office-stamp execution imagery, compact goblin build, and eyelid tallies remain roster-specific.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for silhouette_and_96px_readability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: Service smile, narrowed measuring eye, ready jaw, and controlled press show courteous predation.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for knoll: Trader stamp action dominates; Harmony is confined to paired fixed counterweights and intervals.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, knoll meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
